chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit 707 of 2017 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date: Order with signature of the Judge -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For hearing of CMA No.9803/2017 2. For hearing of CMA No.17229/2017 3. For final arguments 28.08.2024 Mr. Samad Yar advocate holds brief for Mr. Khawaja Shamsul Islam, advocate for the plaintiff Mr. Aamir Ali advocate for defendants No.1 & 2 Ms. Zahrah Sehr Vayani, Assistant Attorney General This suit is pending since 2017 and essentially assails a show cause notice. Law in such regard is settled and can be seen from the judgment in the case of Commissioner Inland Revenue v. Jahangir Khan Tareen reported as 2022 SCMR 92, as approved by the Supreme Court subsequently in Judgment dated 15.09.2022 rendered in DCIR vs. Digicom Trading (CA 2019 of 2016). Be that as it may, matter has been pending for considerable time and on each successive date it appears that the brief is being held for the plaintiff / plaintiff’s counsel and adjournment sought. Same is the case today. Suit is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application/s. Judge Amjad
